chunks.text: O R D E R IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 63 of 2025 Hearing of case For hearing of main case 26.01.2026 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant AG has filed a statement on behalf of SSP, Khairpur Mirs, whereas, Mr. Ali Raza Kanasero, Advocate has also filed vakalatnama as well as a statement on behalf of Respondents 4, 5 and 6. All are taken on record. Notices were issued on 12.01.2026 for today. SHO Police Station, Faiz Ganj is present and produced the detenues 1 and 3, namely Mst. Zareena and Baby Maira. Detenue No.1 Mst. Zareena, who is present in Court states that detenue No.2, namely Naveed residing with her is at home. For the purpose of safe investigation, the matter was taken up in Chamber in presence of learned counsel for the petitioner to record statement of detenue No.1. She categorically states that Petitioner Abdul Latif Rajper, who is her husband, is no more and has expired since filing the instant Petition. She has further stated that in such circumstances, she would like to go with her brothers, who are private respondents in the instant petition. Be that as it may, in the light of statement given by Mst. Zareena, the detenue No.1, she is free to go wherever she pleases. SSP, Khairpur Mirs is directed to ensure that life and liberty of the detenues is safe. A copy of this order be provided to learned Additional AG for compliance. Petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
